violations.text: Establishment was lacking sanitizer for dishes/utensils. Establishment primarily uses single service items. Establishment to purchase sanitizer. Until sanitizer is purchased, only single service items to be used. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025
Spray bottles were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

A hose is connected to the faucet at the mop sink. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
